title: Kyoko and Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Kyoko & Asuka Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 05, 2007 1:13 am LOL SPLIT . --Reichu AEF wrote: Would anyone want to pilot an enslaved God-human with the soul of their mother? I seriously doubt it!

[]: Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Feb 05, 2007 6:31 am Reichu wrote: Episode #25' (Reichu Mod) wrote: words

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 05, 2007 7:59 am MaggotMaster wrote: You've been reading too many of my posts.

[]: Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Feb 05, 2007 8:22 am Reichu wrote: Episode #25' (Reichu Mod) wrote: Win^2

[]: Post by BobBQ » Mon Feb 05, 2007 11:00 am Reichu wrote: ITT we witness the mindblowingly catastrophic effects of MaggotMaster Psychological Contamination (MMPC).

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 05, 2007 3:45 pm Reichu wrote: <big snip>

[]: Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Feb 05, 2007 3:59 pm So you really think that Kyoko was batshit crazy? I personally don't see that, but whatever.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 05, 2007 4:05 pm Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: So you really think that Kyoko was batshit crazy? I personally don't see that, but whatever.

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Feb 05, 2007 4:15 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I always thought Kyoko's red DIE WITH ME ramblings were just from the past, while the blue lines are her current self. Also, stuff in green is Asuka talking. So, where'd ya get that spiffy script from?

[]: Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Feb 05, 2007 4:18 pm I thought that too at first but since I saw someone point out that the rest of Kyoko's soul could be salvaged after death I started thinking differently. Either that the two parts werenâ€™t integrated properly or that the reintroduction of the other half caused instability or mental contamination or some such. I'm sure there are threads. The script is here: http://nge.otaku.ru/scripts/episode25.htm it's Bochan_Bird's translation. Edit: Damn you Ornette and your supiror typing skills Edit 2: I put that line in green because it didn't seem to fit with the tone of either voice.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 05, 2007 4:26 pm I can't think today...What's teh CE again? And are you sure about the green? It sounds like little Asuka to me. *sigh* Could someone post a wav file of this? Listening to this via youtube sucks.

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Feb 05, 2007 4:31 pm CE = Contact Experiment. Part of why all that rambling takes place is because Arael's attack wasn't just on Asuka, but on Kyoko as well ("Eva-02's soul has shut itself away for now").

[]: Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Feb 05, 2007 4:39 pm Contact Experiment. Asuka says nothing other than 'I don't want to die' in that scene, If I spoke Japanese I might be more helpful all I can say is the subs differ from BB's script. Edit: This is no longer funny. In my defence I had to find the right bit in the film and there was the unskipable opening and inconveniently placed chapters ... nice tidbit on Arael by the way. Edit: Typo

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 06, 2007 12:53 am Was the rambling because of Areal's attack? Kyoko let out a nutty giggle before she really started talking to Asuka. I think it's safe to say Kyoko ain't right in the head anymore.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 06, 2007 7:27 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: <snip> What Reichu said was just a humored up version of that.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 06, 2007 7:42 am Those BGM's names are important to get a lot of that post. The one when Kyoko revealed herself to Asuka is called "Emergency Refuge Into Regression", the one after the big ass explosion is called "False Rebirth". The theory that Asuka ain't the one piloting is on showcase in that edit. I also see a jab at video games, and possibly at the manga as well fufufu. WTF, a Wizard of Oz joke too! Did I miss anything Reichu? lol typo

[]: Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Tue Feb 06, 2007 8:58 am Reichu wrote: Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: <snip> What Reichu said was just a humored up version of that.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 06, 2007 9:33 am Dude, chill out. She nitpicks me all the time... and then some.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 06, 2007 3:32 pm *re-watches scene* Ow! *flinches* Damn, Asuka can SCREAM. Anyway, the volume on Youtube really sucks. Not only can I not make out what this line is , I also can't here where it is. Someone with Renewal. PLEASE upload the soundbite! @ AEF: Yeah, I know what the BGM titles are and that they can have a meaning towards the scenes, I just don't want to believe that mostly because 9/11 lines show Kyoko-sama IS sane. ;) And that those lines seem to be from the past as opposed to currently. Couldn't the "False rebirth" indicate the fact Asuka and Kyoko are soon going to get their asses handed to them? @ Reichu: Osaru-chan tte nani? Asuka no stuffed animal desu ka. (saru=monkey deshou?) fufuf, love the Ebichu reference! ;) (Adding de-chu would make it funnier.) KYOKO: I HAVE YOU NOW!!!!!!... my precious little angel, where nothing and no one can ever hurt you again EXCEPT ME. Asuka: Osaru-chan, did you hear a high screechy voice in the background just now? OSARU-CHAN: Not a thing, chu!

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 06, 2007 3:48 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: *re-watches scene* Ow! *flinches* Damn, Asuka can SCREAM. Anyway, the volume on Youtube really sucks. Not only can I not make out what this line is , I also can't here where it is. Someone with Renewal. PLEASE upload the soundbite!;
